  希望多更  快更   虽说故事紧凑  剧情推进快  但是没水文字  而且依照着这种情况 估计是要奔着听一全球去的  所以希望作者能加油  写下去  等着你哦"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766496333,"group_id":"7568826799472249918","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我究竟还在期待什么呢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N65owhrJ488WyTDa6X6u65Lhh2xZ5fhOtox+Onp8iKUm","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/eb8e96c062734df58de417077022aa9a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791850&x-signature=bMLE%2Ftd8MShblIawSNd9ImTicb0%3D","user_id":"4046636944991070","user_name":"落叶飘落不知为何"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4046636944991070","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775271605,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7568826799472249918","book_info":{"abstract":"【爽文+东汉末年+系统+后宫+统一】
刘策穿越到东汉末年，成为家道中落的汉室宗亲，开局获得霸王传承，随后去洛阳买个太守当，先后招揽典韦、赵云、关羽、张飞，并结拜为兄弟。
十几章后，陆续得到天可汗模板，秦琼、程咬金、三千玄甲铁骑。
为了活下去，为了老刘家，为了乱世中的美女，买了个涿郡太守，平定黄巾之乱，封冠军侯，拜骠骑将军，让皇帝下旨替刘策招揽文臣武将，后又平定乌桓、定高句丽、击溃鲜卑，封狼居胥，饮马瀚海，被刘宏封王。
待刘宏死后，刘策携数万精锐南下，马踏中原，一统江山，三造大汉。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/49448021b0e7993df05d08f0e5918d43","author":"青城门的空深彼方","author_id":"","book_id":"7568826799472249918","book_name":"三国：霸王传承，天可汗模板","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7568826836625408574","read_count":"60461","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"790501"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"381","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1538ceca2e81a36ff04ed6155633c9f5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445619&x-signature=BSZV%2FRWT%2BtDTK%2F4dlO6KkmWtet8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109627682426","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"173"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231826598D6EB54E5B6F8D4F80DE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count
